mapper.select: select id, resources_ip, node_port, public_key, short_id, user_id, sni from resource_allocation_temporary_storage where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into resource_allocation_temporary_storage(id, resources_ip, node_port, public_key, short_id, user_id, sni) values (#{entity.id}, #{resourcesIp}, #{nodePort}, #{publicKey}, #{shortId}, #{userId}, #{sni})

insert into resource_allocation_temporary_storage(id,resources_ip, node_port, public_key, short_id, user_id, sni) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesIp}, #{entity.nodePort}, #{entity.publicKey}, #{entity.shortId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.sni})

insert into resource_allocation_temporary_storage(id,resources_ip, node_port, public_key, short_id, user_id, sni) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesIp}, #{entity.nodePort}, #{entity.publicKey}, #{entity.shortId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.sni})
on duplicate key update resources_ip = values(resources_ip), node_port = values(node_port), public_key = values(public_key), short_id = values(short_id), user_id = values(user_id), sni = values(sni)
